finding_results.notes: Compressed the accusation/denial loop into one primary turn, moved redaction/policy conditions earlier, and surfaced Benny's factual witness interruption (busted hand detail) immediately after Deena's opening challenge to restore causal momentum.

Added explicit close-third interior beats for Marisol across the confrontation opening (somatic response, self-monitoring, and positional conflict), preventing an extended external-only run in the office scene.

Reframed June material as vigil-card/family narrative layer and explicitly marked unresolved death-date fact; June 12 is no longer treated as settled chronology, preserving compatibility with later certified-record revelations.

summary: Resolved all packet findings for chapter_05 by tightening confrontation architecture, adding interior pressure beats in the office span, and correcting chronology framing so June narrative artifacts remain distinct from unresolved death-date fact.
